name: Raisin Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel tomatoes and chop very fine.
2. Melt butter in the top of a double boiler.
3. Drop raisins into the melted butter and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Add chopped tomatoes to the mixture; cook over medium heat, uncovered, stirring frequently for 7 minutes.
5. Stir in water, cloves, cinnamon, salt, and pepper.
6. Place the pot over 1 inch of hot water in the double boiler bottom.
7. Cook, uncovered, for 1 hour.
8. Mix in sugar and vinegar.
9. Serve hot or cold. Makes 2 1/2 cups.
